title: goodenia potamica
intro: Goodenia potamica, also known as swamp goodenia, is a small, perennial herb native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used to aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Goodenia potamica are typically made into a tea, infusion, or poultice, and are used to treat various health issues.
